pi_items.source: Direct HTTP verification - website is accessible and returns HTTP 200

Crawled https://crawler-test.com/ and parsed all href attributes. Found only one external link: http://www.søkbar.no (to domain www.søkbar.no). All other http/https links point to crawler-test.com or its subdomains.

Crawled https://crawler-test.com/ and extracted all unique external domains. Only one external domain found: www.søkbar.no (Norwegian domain with special characters). All other links are either relative URLs or point to crawler-test.com/subdomains.
Path specification - cannot verify without executing the task
This is a minimum character count threshold for the report, not a claim about actual data

privileged_info_summary: The target website https://crawler-test.com/ is real and publicly accessible. According to task documentation, this environment uses REAL websites (not synthetic test data). However, the main page only contains 1 external link to 1 external domain (http://www.søkbar.no), contradicting metadata claims of min_external_links=5 and min_external_domains=2. This means the success criteria for the task as defined in the metadata may be unattainable when crawling just the homepage. Related pages on the site like /links/page_with_external_links and /links/max_external_links contain additional external links and domains, but the task description specifies crawling only https://crawler-test.com/.
